title: Grilled Ciabatta Sandwich with Melted Cheese
description: A simple, yet delicious sandwich recipe featuring rich, melted cheese and crispy ciabatta bread.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium heat.
Place the ciabatta slices on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until lightly toasted.
While the bread is toasting, place the shredded cheese in a bowl and stir to separate the curds.
Once the bread is ready, place one slice on a flat surface and spoon half of the cheese mixture onto the bread.
Place the second slice of bread on top of the cheese and press down gently.
Cook the sandwich in the grill for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is crispy.
